articles.title: The Woman with the Hoe Frontispiece
articles.notes: The provided PDF images show pages 27-29 containing Home Science Department content, Notes from the Field section, and a photograph of Northwestern States Mission Relief Society members. No frontispiece or article titled 'The Woman with the Hoe Frontispiece' appears in these pages. A frontispiece would typically be an illustration or image at the beginning of the magazine, not textual content to extract.
